_comment: Copy this file to manifest.json (git-ignored) and fill in your documents. Section keys: concept, strategy, market, financials, product, operations, launch, legal, deck. doc_type: 'document' (default) | 'presentation'. audience: 'board' (default, full-access investors) | 'prospect' (shown to all investors including prospects).
